title: Bed Voting Data Pack
description: Vote on if the night should be skipped!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6v89gbzk1pk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This Data Pack lets you vote on if you want to skip the night or not!
If one player wants to sleep but everyone else wants to get monster loot, no worries!
One player doesn't want to sleep? Doesn't affect you!

Sleep in a bed to start a vote. When a vote starts, run /trigger y or /trigger n to vote. The vote will end after 30 seconds. If the majority votes yes, the night will be skipped. If the majority votes no or is a tie, the night will not be skipped.

If a vote ends in a no or tie, a cooldown will activate before the next vote can start. Admins can enable and disable the cooldown with these commands:
Disable: /function bedvote:cooldown/disable
Enable: /function bedvote:cooldown/enable
